Motion And Notice Of Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar Nov-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for entry of default ourt judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:50:59 a.m. and concluding at 09:55:16 a.m.

Plaintiff Blue & Gold Fleet L.P. represented by Richard J. Zuromski, Jr, Esq. and Jon-Patrick A. Jones, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant CS Global SF LLC not appearing.

Court haas reviewed all moving papers.
Court finds Plaintiff has established it's case in the pleadings.

After review, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Blue & Gold Fleet L.P., and against Defendant CS Global SF LLC, as follows:

Damages: $122,488.50
Prejudgment Interest: $23,256.04
Attorney Fees: Waived
Costs: $754.45

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $146,498.99

Proposed judgment to be submitted.
